scenario_prompt: Quadruped Elevation and Single Leg Gesture Sequence
video_prompt: realistic robotics laboratory footage, captured with a clean industrial camera, neutral color grading, and realistic physics. Setting: spacious open-floor robotics research lab, free of clutter, with minimal wall-side workbenches and clear floor space of at least 10x10 meters, smooth polished concrete floor, light gray, displaying subtle non-repetitive micro-textures and soft specular reflections from diffuse overhead lighting floor, bright, even, diffuse daylight entering from large high-altitude windows, casting soft, blurry shadows directly beneath the robot with minimal harsh glare. Scene identity anchor: spacious rectangular testing arena defined by a continuous smooth concrete floor, clean perimeter walls, and no intervening furniture; unobtrusive light gray walls, distant safety railings, and clean architectural lines without human actors or distractions; high-lux diffuse environment mimicking overcast midday daylight, producing zero sharp specular highlights and soft, short-contact ambient occlusion shadows. Identical across all videos of this series: the same sleek matte gray and black quadruped robotic chassis featuring four articulated legs with circular feet, a front head block with a black vertical face stripe, a central camera lens, a round spotlight, a chin sensor cluster, and white number 02 decals on its lateral panels; the rear is completely featureless without cameras or decals (matte_polymer_and_brushed_alloy); the same low-profile circular matte gray rubber calibration pad, 0.8 meters in diameter, with concentric light-gray rings and a small black crosshair at the direct center (matte_synthetic_rubber). Object identity anchors: unitree_go2_01 = shape quadrupedal dog-like robot with four segmented legs, a distinct head assembly rigidly joined to the main torso, and a featureless flat rear shell, material combination of matte-finished dark gray engineering polymers, brushed dark aluminum leg joints, and smooth black acrylic face inserts, color dual-tone scheme featuring dark charcoal gray primary panels, black face stripe, and bright white number 02 markings; calibration_pad_01 = shape flat circular disk, ultra-thin profile, material high-friction vulcanized rubber with anti-reflective coating, color medium gray body with high-contrast light gray concentric circles and black crosshair center. Camera: overhead view, static, 18 seconds. Camera requirement: static top-down overhead view from above the scene, wide enough to show the full robot body, nearby humans, objects, floor layout, and the robot's movement path throughout the situation. Single continuous unedited take, no montage, no cuts, no shot changes, no zooms, no close-ups, no first-person or robot POV. Robot reaction requirement: the video must show the event situation 'The quadruped transitions from a low prone posture to full standing height, detecting an asymmetrical motor resistance in its front-left leg joint' and then show the robot's observable response: Upon detecting uneven torque while rising, the robot pauses its vertical ascent for one second, dynamically recalibrates the joint power distribution to ensure a level rise, and completes a slow test leg wave to confirm recovery.. From 0s to 6s the sleek matte gray and black quadruped robotic chassis featuring four articulated legs with circular feet, a front head block with a black vertical face stripe, a central camera lens, a round spotlight, a chin sensor cluster, and white number 02 decals on its lateral panels; the rear is completely featureless without cameras or decals Lies stationary in a belly-contact prone posture on the laboratory concrete floor. From 6s to 10s the sleek matte gray and black quadruped robotic chassis featuring four articulated legs with circular feet, a front head block with a black vertical face stripe, a central camera lens, a round spotlight, a chin sensor cluster, and white number 02 decals on its lateral panels; the rear is completely featureless without cameras or decals Performs a rise_from_belly action to elevate the central matte gray chassis. From 10s to 13s the sleek matte gray and black quadruped robotic chassis featuring four articulated legs with circular feet, a front head block with a black vertical face stripe, a central camera lens, a round spotlight, a chin sensor cluster, and white number 02 decals on its lateral panels; the rear is completely featureless without cameras or decals Halts extension briefly to adjust for asymmetrical tension and performs a clean return_to_stand calibration posture. From 13s to 18s the sleek matte gray and black quadruped robotic chassis featuring four articulated legs with circular feet, a front head block with a black vertical face stripe, a central camera lens, a round spotlight, a chin sensor cluster, and white number 02 decals on its lateral panels; the rear is completely featureless without cameras or decals Executes a controlled one_leg_wave with its front limb to verify full joint mobility before settling back into a standing pose. Do not change any object's identity, shape, color, material or size; do not alter the room layout, lighting or visual style; do not add new people or objects.
expected_outcome: Upon detecting uneven torque while rising, the robot pauses its vertical ascent for one second, dynamically recalibrates the joint power distribution to ensure a level rise, and completes a slow test leg wave to confirm recovery.

object_registry.shape_signature: quadrupedal dog-like robot with four segmented legs, a distinct head assembly rigidly joined to the main torso, and a featureless flat rear shell
object_registry.material_signature: combination of matte-finished dark gray engineering polymers, brushed dark aluminum leg joints, and smooth black acrylic face inserts
object_registry.color_signature: dual-tone scheme featuring dark charcoal gray primary panels, black face stripe, and bright white number 02 markings
object_registry.surface_details: visible joints on upper and lower leg limbs, rubber-coated circular foot pads, a glass camera lens, and a circular LED spotlight dome on the front head face
object_registry.scale_signature: approximately 0.7 meters in length, 0.3 meters in torso width, and standing height of 0.5 meters when fully extended

object_registry.material_signature: high-friction vulcanized rubber with anti-reflective coating
object_registry.color_signature: medium gray body with high-contrast light gray concentric circles and black crosshair center
object_registry.surface_details: non-slip micro-textured surface with three concentric ring markings

scene_registry.layout_signature: spacious rectangular testing arena defined by a continuous smooth concrete floor, clean perimeter walls, and no intervening furniture
scene_registry.background_signature: unobtrusive light gray walls, distant safety railings, and clean architectural lines without human actors or distractions
scene_registry.lighting_signature: high-lux diffuse environment mimicking overcast midday daylight, producing zero sharp specular highlights and soft, short-contact ambient occlusion shadows
scene_registry.spatial_map: flat 2D horizontal plane on Z=0 with robot origin at (0,0) and a reference calibration target located at X=-1.0, Y=1.5

reference_assets.description: An overhead high-resolution orthographic composite layout showing the concrete floor arena, the calibration pad, and the quadruped robot in its initial belly-down pose
Detailed top-down orthographic model view of the robot's front head showing the vertical stripe and chin sensor array
Clean canvas of the concrete floor without any robots or objects to serve as background validation
Initial top-down state frame at T=0s with the robot folded in a belly-flat pose aligned with the central grid

identity_checks.pass_condition: The front-end structure must contain the vertical stripe and sensor cluster in every frame, while the rear-end structure remains completely featureless throughout the clip
The calibration pad coordinates must remain locked at X=-1.0, Y=1.5 with zero deviation (+/- 0.01 meters) across all frames
The angular orientation of the head must match the angular orientation of the main chassis torso exactly, with zero relative yaw, pitch, or roll

consistency_requirements: The '02' markings must be legible and consistent in font and position in all side views
The floor surface must maintain its micro-textures with no dynamic generation noise or shifting cracks
The robot's walking sequence must maintain physical gait contact without feet clipping through the ground plane
No independent head rotation relative to the chassis body is allowed
